name: io.github.tponscr-debug/oracle-h
description: Human approval gate for AI agents. Critical actions approved or rejected by a human via Telegram.

environmentVariables.name: ORACLE_SIGNATURE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your ORACLE-H signature key for authentication. Use 'demo-signature-key-change-in-production' for testing with no signup required.

environmentVariables.name: ORACLE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: ORACLE-H service base URL. Defaults to https://oracle-h.online
